tests.name: slugify produces chg-<date>-<slug> format
slugify strips special characters
slugify lowercases the title
slugify truncates slug to 40 chars
slugify trims trailing dashes from slug
slugify collapses multiple consecutive spaces into a single dash
slugify trims leading and trailing whitespace before slug conversion
detectAffectedArtifacts returns empty when no spec files exist
detectAffectedArtifacts includes PRD.md for spec-change type even without keyword matches
detectAffectedArtifacts includes use-cases.md when title contains 'workflow'
detectAffectedArtifacts includes TechSpec.md for architecture keywords
detectAffectedArtifacts includes docs/adrs/ for adr-supersession type
detectAffectedArtifacts includes openapi.yaml for breaking-api type when present
detectAffectedArtifacts does not include files that do not exist
detectAffectedArtifacts does not add docs/adrs/ from keyword when type is not adr-supersession and keywords absent
detectAffectedArtifacts adds docs/adrs/ for adr-supersession type even without adr keywords in title
detectAffectedArtifacts adds docs/adrs/ for non-adr type when title has 'architecture' keyword (>3 chars)
detectAffectedArtifacts short words (≤3 chars) are excluded from keyword matching
detectAffectedArtifacts deduplicates artifacts
detectRequiredGates returns empty when gate dir does not exist
detectRequiredGates includes l2-* gates from active dir
detectRequiredGates includes contract-testing-required gate
detectRequiredGates adds schema gates for breaking-api type
detectRequiredGates adds contract gates when breaking=true
detectRequiredGates does not duplicate gates
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips a minimal record
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips breaking_details
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips supersedes_adr
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips affected_artifacts list
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips required_gates list
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip serialized text has required_gates: [] for empty gates
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip serialized text contains gate IDs in list format
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip serialized text includes breaking_details field when set
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip serialized text omits breaking_details when not set
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip serialized text includes supersedes_adr field when set
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip round-trips breaking=false correctly
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip parseChangeRecord: blocked_reason is returned when not ~ in YAML
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip parseChangeRecord: blocked_reason is undefined when ~ in YAML
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip parseChangeRecord: verified_at is returned when not ~ in YAML
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip parseChangeRecord: verified_at is undefined when ~ in YAML
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip parseChangeRecord: closed_at is returned when not ~ in YAML
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip parseChangeRecord: closed_at is undefined when ~ in YAML
serializeChangeRecord + parseChangeRecord round-trip returns null for invalid YAML content
loadAllChanges returns empty array when changes dir does not exist
loadAllChanges returns parsed records from yaml files
loadAllChanges skips non-yaml files
loadAllChanges handles multiple records
getImplementingChanges returns only implementing-status records
getImplementingChanges returns empty when no implementing changes
changeRequestHandler creates the changes directory and writes a yaml file
changeRequestHandler output includes the generated ID
changeRequestHandler uses provided affected_artifacts over auto-detection
changeRequestHandler shows breaking warning when breaking=true
changeRequestHandler shows supersedes_adr notice
changeRequestHandler output includes required gates section when gates are non-empty
changeRequestHandler output omits required gates section when gates are empty
changeRequestHandler breaking=false is preserved in the written yaml
changeRequestHandler breaking defaults to false when not provided
changeRequestHandler includes Next Steps guidance
listChangesHandler returns 'no records' message when changes dir is empty
listChangesHandler lists all changes grouped by status
listChangesHandler filters by status when status param is provided
listChangesHandler shows 'no filter match' message when filtered status has no results
listChangesHandler shows close_cycle block warning for implementing changes
listChangesHandler never marks verified changes as stale regardless of age
listChangesHandler does not show close_cycle warning when no implementing changes exist
listChangesHandler shows gate names in close_cycle warning when implementing change has gates
listChangesHandler shows dash in gates column for change with no required_gates
listChangesHandler shows gate count for change with required_gates
listChangesHandler marks stale open changes with warning indicator
listChangesHandler never marks closed or verified changes as stale regardless of age
listChangesHandler does not mark a change created exactly 7 days ago as stale
listChangesHandler marks a change created 8 days ago as stale
